criteria.description: Version output starts with copyable version information
criteria.evidence: PYENV_VERSION=3.12.7 python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -e ".[test]" && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_version_output.py -q -> 4 passed

criteria.description: Large banner does not block copyable version output
criteria.evidence: PYENV_VERSION=3.12.7 python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -e ".[test]" && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_version_output.py -q -> 4 passed
criteria.notes: test_version_output_does_not_render_large_banner asserts title text and block-art characters are absent

criteria.description: Version output preserves the product/version value
criteria.evidence: PYENV_VERSION=3.12.7 python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -e ".[test]" && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_version_output.py -q -> 4 passed
criteria.notes: The callback still prints `spec-kitty-cli version {__version__}` and exits through Typer

criteria.description: Decorative art is secondary to the version value
criteria.evidence: PYENV_VERSION=3.12.7 python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -e ".[test]" && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_version_output.py -q -> 4 passed
criteria.notes: No decorative art is rendered in version output, satisfying the allowed removal path
